mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID AS COURSE_ID , T2.WEEK , T3.ID AS ASSIGNMENT_ID , T3.TITLE , T3.START_DT , T3.END_DT , CASE WHEN NOW() BETWEEN T3.START_DT AND T3.END_DT THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS IS_PERIOD , CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ASSIGNMENT_SUBMISSIONS T4 WHERE T4.ASSIGNMENT_ID = T3.ID AND T4.STUDENT_ID = #{id} ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SUB_STATUS FROM COURSES T1 INNER JOIN LECTURES T2 ON T1.ID = T2.COURSE_ID INNER JOIN ASSIGNMENTS T3 ON T1.ID = T3.COURSE_ID
AND T2.START_DT <= T3.START_DT AND T2.END_DT >= T3.END_DT
WHERE T1.ID = #{courseId} AND T2.WEEK = #{week} ORDER BY SUB_STATUS ASC, T3.ID ASC
